items.name: Chana Chatpate
items.description: Nepalese sour, hot & spicy street food prepared with mixture of peas, onion, Tomato puffed rice, lime, potatoes, noodles and served in a paper cone.

items.name: Pani Puri (10 pcs)
items.description: It's a crispy, hollow, fried dough balls (puri) stuffed with a combination of finely diced potato, onion, peas and chickpea together with spicy tangy water easily fills one's mouth.

items.name: Chicken Sausage (2)
items.description: Deep fried sausage with spicy pickle which is very popular street food in Nepal.

items.name: Crispy Chicken Wings (5 Pieces)
items.description: Chicken wings marinated in chefs' special spices, batter coated and deep fried, served with tomato and Sesame seeds dip.

items.name: Chicken 65
items.description: Succulent chicken pieces marinated with coconut, mustard seed and finished with fresh herb.

items.name: Aloo Sadeko
items.description: Crispy potato cubes marinated in fresh ginger, garlic, onion, tomato & green Nepalese spices.

items.name: Buff Chilli
items.description: Pan fried buff on rich tomato chilli sauce with onion and capsicum and secret Nepalese spices.

items.name: Newari Khaja set
items.description: Traditional combinational Khaja set of chicken or Buff or Goat choyla, Fried chicken Giblets, Aloo sadeko mula ko Achar, Bhatmas sadeko, masala fried cheura, Salad and prawn crackers.

items.name: Sadeko
items.description: Tenderly char-grilled meat marinated in fresh ginger, garlic, onion, tomato & green Nepalese spices.

items.name: Jhaneko Sekuwa
items.description: Tenderly char-grilled meat Tossed with onion, capsicum and served in smoky sizzler plate. Dine in only.

items.name: Steamed Mo:Mo
items.description: Nepalese style dumplings wrapped in flour dough and steamed, served with tomato & sesame seeds dip. All dumpling servings in a 10 pcs.

items.name: Fried Mo:Mo
items.description: Nepalese style dumplings wrapped in flour dough and fried, served with tomato & sesame seeds dip. All dumpling servings in a 10 pcs.

items.name: Chilli (C) Mo:Mo
items.description: Nepalese style dumplings wrapped in flour dough pan tossed with Chilli. Fried only.

items.name: Sadeko Mo:Mo (Salad Dumplings)
items.description: Steamed dumplings marinated w/lemon juice, fresh onion, tomatoes and spices.

items.name: Jhol Mo:Mo (Sesame & tomato gravy)
items.description: Steamed Dumpling mixed with spicy sesame seeds and soya bean gravy.

items.name: Jumbo Mo:Mo Share Platter
items.description: Assorted with 4 pcs of each C-mo:mo, jhol mo:mo, Fried mo:mo, Steamed and Sadeko mo:mo.

categories.name: Chow Mein (Nepalese Style Stir Fried Noodle)

items.name: Chow Mein
items.description: Stir-fried noodles with Onion, carrot, bell pepper cooked in homemade tangy tomato and soya sauce, garnished with fresh cilantro and green onions.

items.name: Gobi Manchurian
items.description: Deep fried cauliflower seasoned with coriander, celery and garlic and chilly soy sauce.

items.description: Home-made paneer cooked with garlic, onion capsicum and secret spices.

items.name: Veg Manchurian
items.description: Mixed Vegetable balls seasoned with coriander, celery and garlic and soy sauce.

items.name: Chilli Chicken
items.description: Mouth-watering boneless chicken mixed with red chilli, onion and soy sauce.

items.name: Chicken Manchurian
items.description: Mouth-watering boneless chicken seasoned with coriander, sautéed ginger and garlic and chilly soy sauce.

items.name: Fish Curry
items.description: Boneless Barramundi fish filet cooked in Nepalese spice and herbs.

items.name: Pea & Potato Samosa (2pcs)

items.name: Veg Pakora (V/GF) (6 pcs)
items.description: It is a delightful vegan vegetable pakoras, fried to crispy golden-brown perfection and served with date and tamarind sauce.

items.name: Chicken 65

Couples Pack (2 people)
items.description: 1x Veg Pakora (4 pcs). Mains: 2x Any Main Meals (Except Signature and Seafood Section), 2x Basmati Steamed Rice, 1x Plain or Garlic Naan, 1x Raita. Dessert: 1x Gulab Jamun (Milk dumpling) with yoghurt or mango kulfi.

items.name: Family Pack (4 People)
items.description: 2x Veg Pakora, 2x chicken Tikka. Mains: 4x Curries of your choice (Except Signature and Seafood Section), 4x Basmati Steamed Rice, 2x Plain or Garlic Naan, 1x Raita, 1x Papad. Dessert: 1x Gulab Jamun (Milk dumpling) with yoghurt or mango kulfi.
